credit-my-cc-description:
Have you found a use of a work you uploaded to Wikimedia Commons where the license is not being properly followed?
Are you unsure how to phrase a complaint?
Then you can use the tool below to quickly put together an email to the wrongdoer.
credit-my-cc-noscript: This webpage requires JavaScript. Most likely nothing will work properly without it.
credit-my-cc-filename-title: The name of the used file on Wikimedia Commons
credit-my-cc-usage-title: Where is the file used improperly
credit-my-cc-credit-title: How I want to be credited
credit-my-cc-description-title: A short description of the image (can be omitted)
credit-my-cc-letter-type-title: Choose one of the different letter formats
credit-my-cc-copy-instructions:
Copy text and formatting by pressing Ctrl + c or ⌘ + c (you don't need to select the text).
This allows you to easily paste the text into an email you send.
credit-my-cc-no-license:
The file page seems to lack a machine-readable license.
Please fix the file page and try again.
credit-my-cc-no-information:
The file page seems to lack machine-readable metadata about the creator or another required field.
Add an Information template to the page and try again.
credit-my-cc-upload-date-note: Note that the automatic date is for the most recent upload.
credit-my-cc-unsupported-license: This file unfortunately has a license that is currently not supported by the tool.
credit-my-cc-public-domain:
This file appears to be in the public domain (i.e. not protected by copyright).
No complaint is therefore possible.
credit-my-cc-cc0:
This file appears to have been licensed under CC0, meaning it is in the public domain (i.e. not protected by copyright).
No complaint is therefore possible.
credit-my-cc-missing-file: Could not find the file. Are you sure you entered the correct filename?
credit-my-cc-random-url: Please enter the name of a file on Wikimedia Commons (this appears to be a URL somewhere else).
credit-my-cc-api-error: Something went wrong when connecting to Wikimedia Commons.
credit-my-cc-missing-parameter: The following required fields are missing:
credit-my-cc-footer-produced-for: This tool was produced by $2 based on an earlier tool produced for $1 by $3.
credit-my-cc-footer-source: You can find the source code on $1 and report bugs/improvements there.
credit-my-cc-footer-logo: The logo uses elements from the $1 by Creative Commons ($2) and $3 by Amada44 (Public Domain).
credit-my-cc-letter-template-happy:
Hi!

It's nice to see that you are using my image from Wikimedia Commons$1 on this page:
$2

My original can be found$3 on this page:
$4

I have chosen to make the image available under a Creative Commons license precisely so it can be used by as many people as possible. However, it seems that you have missed fulfilling the conditions of the Creative Commons license I chose.

You can fix this by:

  • Stating that I am the one who took the image: $5
  • Stating which license the image is available under: $6
  • Linking to the license text: $7
  • Stating the title of the image: $8
  • Linking to where you obtained the image: $4
  • If you have made changes to the image, this should also be mentioned.

Examples of how this can look:

  • Online: $9
  • In print: $10

Only if you fulfill these simple conditions is your use under the Creative Commons license valid.

Kind regards,

[Name]
credit-my-cc-letter-template-neutral:
Hi!

I see that you are using my image from Wikimedia Commons$1 on this page:
$2

My original can be found$3 on this page:
$4

However, I am sad to see that you have not respected my copyright, even though I have been generous and licensed the image under a Creative Commons license.

What you need to do is:

  • Stating that I am the one who took the image: $5
  • Stating which license the image is available under: $6
  • Linking to the license text: $7
  • Stating the title of the image: $8
  • Linking to where you obtained the image: $4
  • If you have made changes to the image, this should also be mentioned.

Examples of how this can look:

  • Online: $9
  • In print: $10

Only if you fulfill these simple conditions are you free to use my image without other compensation.

Regards,

[Name]
credit-my-cc-letter-template-angry:
To whom it may concern,

I have noticed that you are using my image from Wikimedia Commons$1 on the following page:
$2

My original is available$3 on the following page:
$4

Unfortunately, it seems that you have not respected my copyright, despite the fact that I have generously licensed the image under a Creative Commons license.

What you need to do is:

  • Stating that I am the one who took the image: $5
  • Stating which license the image is available under: $6
  • Linking to the license text: $7
  • Stating the title of the image: $8
  • Linking to where you obtained the image: $4
  • If you have made changes to the image, this should also be mentioned.

Examples of how this can look:

  • Online: $9
  • In print: $10

If these conditions are not met, the license is not applicable to your use. Your use of the image therefore constitutes unauthorized use of copyrighted material for which compensation may be demanded in accordance with copyright law.

Regards,

[Name]
